## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership for using AI-powered content generation and workflows to improve the client's legal firm's digital marketing and SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs uses AI workflows to generate high-quality content at scale, adapting to client needs](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [They aim to deliver 100,000+ words per month at $9,000, outperforming traditional content agencies](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Their approach involves expert oversight, manual reviews, and continuous workflow optimization](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [The client is interested but needs to convince tech-averse partners through samples/demos](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [GrowthX is motivated to prove their model in this new legal industry use case](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Labs Introduction

  - [Marcel and team build AI content workflows adapted to client needs](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Hire vetted writers who learn prompt engineering, workflow operation](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [End-to-end service from strategy to publishing, with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Seeing great results for clients, e.g. 30x traffic growth for one](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### Legal Industry Challenges

  - [Highly regulated, need attorney approval on all published content](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [Tech adoption is slow, partners are very tech-averse](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=2121.0)
  - [Client needs to translate value to leadership through samples/demos](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

### Potential Partnership Structure

  - [Start with sample content piece to showcase capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=2616.0)
  - [Aim for 100k+ words/month at $9k if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=2391.0)
  - [Discuss potential exclusivity arrangement given niche practice area](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [Client to manage relationship, GrowthX to adapt workflows](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=2673.0)

### Use Case Examples

  - [Summarizing public broker disciplinary records into blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Covering emerging legal topics like crypto litigation](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=3012.0)
  - [Refreshing old sites with high-quality, SEO-optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=3008.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide sample content piece on client's chosen topic](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=2616.0)
  - [Client to share sample with partners and gauge interest](https://fathom.video/share/eXFsNzGtzuVYugQrgyk9ydQLQPQe4jzv?tab=summary&timestamp=2673.0)

Consider referring legal clients through Marcel's referral program if it makes financial sense for the firm and does not compete with Investor Claims
Decide whether to join Marcel's AI content generation workshop, weighing the potential benefits of learning their techniques against the risk of giving away proprietary knowledge
